## Problem

<!-- What user, product, contract, or engineering problem does this PR solve? -->

## Decision / Implementation

<!-- Summarize the chosen design and the important implementation boundaries. -->

## Invariants affected

<!-- List affected Core, Revision, Transaction, Position, Contract, or authority invariants. Use N/A when none apply. -->

## Tests

<!-- List automated checks and focused manual verification. -->

## Compatibility / Migration

<!-- Describe Contract/API compatibility, generated artifacts, fixtures, migrations, and rollback. Use N/A when none apply. -->

## Security / Privacy

<!-- Describe trusted-boundary, capability, data-minimization, and dependency effects. Use N/A when none apply. -->

## Performance

<!-- State the measured impact on relevant budgets, or explain why there is no material impact. -->

## Follow-ups

<!-- Link required issues with owners and due dates. Use N/A when none apply. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Formatting, lint, architecture checks, typecheck, tests, build, and generated checks pass.
- [ ] Public API and Contract changes include versioning, schema, generated types, fixtures, and changelog updates.
- [ ] Normative document versions and the engineering configuration hash are synchronized.
- [ ] Required ADRs and cross-repository owner reviews are present.
- [ ] No unrelated formatting or generated-code edits are included.
